lines.english: Who will be driving the buses next week?
lines.raw: Who will be driving the buses next week? | 下周谁来开公交车？

lines.english: Busmen have decided to go on strike next week.
lines.chinese: 公交车司机们已决定下周举行罢工。
lines.raw: Busmen have decided to go on strike next week. | 公交车司机们已决定下周举行罢工。

lines.english: The strike is due to begin on Tuesday.
lines.raw: The strike is due to begin on Tuesday. | 罢工定于周二开始。

lines.english: No one knows how long it will last.
lines.chinese: 没人知道罢工会持续多久。
lines.raw: No one knows how long it will last. | 没人知道罢工会持续多久。

lines.english: The busmen have stated that the strike will continue until general agreement is reached about pay and working conditions.
lines.chinese: 公交车司机们声明，罢工将持续到在工资和工作条件方面达成普遍协议为止。
lines.raw: The busmen have stated that the strike will continue until general agreement is reached about pay and working conditions. | 公交车司机们声明，罢工将持续到在工资和工作条件方面达成普遍协议为止。

lines.english: Most people believe that the strike will last for at least a week.
lines.chinese: 大多数人认为罢工至少会持续一周。
lines.raw: Most people believe that the strike will last for at least a week. | 大多数人认为罢工至少会持续一周。

lines.english: Many owners of private cars are going to offer 'free rides' to people on their way to work.
lines.chinese: 许多私家车车主将为上班族提供“免费搭车”服务。
lines.raw: Many owners of private cars are going to offer 'free rides' to people on their way to work. | 许多私家车车主将为上班族提供“免费搭车”服务。

lines.english: This will relieve pressure on the trains to some extent.
lines.chinese: 这将在一定程度上减轻火车的压力。
lines.raw: This will relieve pressure on the trains to some extent. | 这将在一定程度上减轻火车的压力。

lines.english: Meanwhile, a number of university students have volunteered to drive buses while the strike lasts.
lines.chinese: 同时，一些大学生已志愿在罢工期间驾驶公交车。
lines.raw: Meanwhile, a number of university students have volunteered to drive buses while the strike lasts. | 同时，一些大学生已志愿在罢工期间驾驶公交车。

lines.english: All the students are expert drivers,
lines.chinese: 所有学生都是驾驶专家，
lines.raw: All the students are expert drivers, | 所有学生都是驾驶专家，

lines.english: but before they drive any of the buses, they will have to pass a special test.
lines.chinese: 但在他们驾驶任何公交车之前，他们必须通过一项特殊的考试。
lines.raw: but before they drive any of the buses, they will have to pass a special test. | 但在他们驾驶任何公交车之前，他们必须通过一项特殊的考试。

lines.english: The students are going to take the test in two days' time.
lines.chinese: 学生们将在两天后参加考试。
lines.raw: The students are going to take the test in two days' time. | 学生们将在两天后参加考试。

lines.english: Even so, people are going to find it difficult to get to work.
lines.chinese: 即使如此，人们仍然会发现上班很困难。
lines.raw: Even so, people are going to find it difficult to get to work. | 即使如此，人们仍然会发现上班很困难。

lines.english: But so far, the public has expressed its gratitude to the students in lettters to the Press.
lines.chinese: 但到目前为止，公众已通过写信给报社的方式表达了对学生的感激之情。
lines.raw: But so far, the public has expressed its gratitude to the students in lettters to the Press. | 但到目前为止，公众已通过写信给报社的方式表达了对学生的感激之情。

lines.english: Only one or two people have objected that the students will drive too fast!
lines.chinese: 只有一两个人反对，认为学生们会开得太快！
lines.raw: Only one or two people have objected that the students will drive too fast! | 只有一两个人反对，认为学生们会开得太快！
